case_title: UNIFUND CCR, LLC VS. PHAM, TAM T. A/K/A TAM THI et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PHAM, TAM T. A/K/A TAM THI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 27, 2014 AT 9:30 A.M. IN ORDER TO PERMIT THE LOS ANGELES SHERIFF TO PROVIDE THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE SHERIFF IS REQUESTED TO PROVIDE THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET, INCLUDING THE COVER SHEET THAT STATES WHAT, IF ANY, MONEY IS BEING HELD, TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN JANUARY 21, 2014 AT 4 PM. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE COURT TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT TAM PHAM'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. MS. PHAM HAS STATED UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY THAT THE FUNDS DEPOSITED IN HER CITIBANK FSB ACCOUNT ARE SSI/SDI BENEFITS. THE AMOUNTS DEPOSITED PER MONTH FALL WITHIN THE AUTOMATIC EXEMPTION PURSUANT TO CCP 704.080(B)(2). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition Attached
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. D. MARCOLINI, TEL. NO. 568-0742 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
TAM PHAM, TEL. NO. 567-1816, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE COURT TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Tam Pham's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted. Ms. Pham has stated under penalty of perjury that the funds deposited in her Citibank FSB account are SSI/SDI benefits. The amounts deposited per month fall within the automatic exemption pursuant to CCP 704.080(b)(2). ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
=302/eg

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition Attached
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Continued To Jan-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JILL BATES-MOORE, ESQ., 510.985.9250, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S Hearing On DEFENDANT'S Claim Of Exemption IS Continued to January 27, 2014 at 9:30 a.m. in order to permit the Los Angeles Sheriff to provide the Claim of Exemption packet in its entirety. The Sheriff is requested to provide the Claim of Exemption packet, including the cover sheet that states what, if any, money is being held, to Department 302 no later than January 21, 2014 at 4 pm. Order signed AFTER HEARING. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
